q: Fibre optics works on the principle of refraction.
The refractive index of the core in an optical fibre is slightly greater than that of the cladding.
Total internal reflection occurs when the angle of incidence is less than the critical angle.
Endoscopy is a surgical procedure to examine the interior of a human body.
An optical spectrometer consists of a light source, collimator, dispersion element, and telescope.
